nodes.grounding_span: the AI didn't understand the balance I was after

nodes.label: Professional competence and client satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: my work needs to be consistent

nodes.label: Creative inspiration and ideation
nodes.grounding_span: trigger an idea I hadn't thought of

nodes.label: Personal growth and knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: I thrive when I'm learning new things

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: when used a collaboration tool, its transformative

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: the models went way out to left field

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I see it becoming more integrated with my life

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing jobs
nodes.grounding_span: its seen somewhat as something that can replace our profession

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I go back and forth with the AI until I get acceptable options

nodes.label: Preparatory groundwork before AI involvement
nodes.grounding_span: I'll start by clearly identifying my intent and outline what I'm looking for
